note: Template for Galaxy (Galaxy Europe) provenance. The Galaxy path requires a usegalaxy.eu API key at ~/.galaxy_eu_key. After a real run, scripts/cellprofiler_tracking.py records the invocation id(s) and the public history URL here; fill the fields below from results/.galaxy_cache.json and results/track_summary.json. Until then the pipeline runs via the byte-comparable local fallback (engine=local:skimage).
method: CellProfiler object tracking (Starting Modules -> ColorToGray -> IdentifyPrimaryObjects -> MeasureObjectSizeShape -> MeasureObjectIntensity -> TrackObjects[Overlap, 50px] -> OverlayOutlines -> Tile -> SaveImages -> ExportToSpreadsheet)
target: Iceberg A-68A drift past South Georgia, MODIS time-series (NASA GIBS)
